ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 5'10") */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (e.g., 180 lbs) */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the player (left, right) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Player's current salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team" TEXT /* Name of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie)
Date of birth of the player
Round in which the player was drafted
Start date of the player's current contract
End date of the player's current contract
Number of teams participating in the season
Total number of games in the season
Name of the team that won the championship
